output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?homeTeam ?foundingYear WHERE {
  ?match wdt:P361 wd:Q4613590 ; p:P261 ?roundStmt ; p:P1833 ?awayStmt ; p:P1890 ?homeStmt .
  ?roundStmt ps:P261 4 .
  ?awayStmt ps:P1833 wd:Q572940 .
  ?homeStmt ps:P1890 ?homeTeam .
  ?homeTeam wdt:P571 ?foundingDate .
  BIND(YEAR(?foundingDate) AS ?foundingYear)
}
